semantic.role: Architectural constraints for layered modularity in the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Define strict boundaries between CLI entrypoints, service orchestration, core pipeline, task stages, analysis engines, and infrastructure facades
Prescribe allowed and forbidden dependency directions to prevent architectural erosion
Provide severity levels (Error/Warning) and rationale for each constraint to guide contributors and AI agents
outOfScope: Specific coding style or naming conventions unrelated to layering
Business logic implementation details or domain rules
Tooling or deployment configuration outside the source code module structure

English.purpose: This document establishes a set of layered architecture constraints that enforce a clear separation of concerns among the CLI, services, runtime, core, tasks, engines, and infra modules. Its goal is to keep the codebase maintainable, testable, and understandable by preventing inappropriate cross-layer dependencies.
English.context_and_audience: Targeted at developers and AI agents who contribute to the ArchSpine repository. The rules are designed to be enforced by static analysis or code review to preserve the intended modular structure as the project evolves.
key_takeaways: CLI modules must remain thin adapters and must not absorb pipeline or persistence logic.
Services orchestrate core/tasks/engines/infra, but view-specific services belong under src/services/view/.
Runtime compatibility modules centralize schema versioning and migrations in a single layer.
Core modules define pipeline contracts without depending on CLI code.
Task modules implement stage-local work on top of core contracts and engines.
Engines provide reusable analysis logic independent of CLI and service orchestration.
Infra modules expose stable low-level facades; callers should prefer public facades over deep internals.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了一套分层架构约束，强制 CLI、services、runtime、core、tasks、engines 和 infra 模块之间保持清晰的关注点分离。其目标是通过防止不恰当的跨层依赖，使代码库保持可维护性、可测试性和可理解性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向为 ArchSpine 仓库做出贡献的开发者和 AI 代理。这些规则旨在通过静态分析或代码审查来执行，以确保项目演进过程中预期的模块化结构得以保留。
key_takeaways: CLI 模块必须保持为薄适配器，不得吸收流水线或持久化逻辑。
Services 层编排 core/tasks/engines/infra 模块，但与视图相关的服务应位于 src/services/view/ 下。
runtime 兼容性模块集中管理 schema 版本分类和确定性内存迁移。
核心（core）模块定义流水线契约，不依赖 CLI 入口代码。
任务（tasks）模块在核心契约和引擎之上实现阶段局部工作。
引擎（engines）提供可复用的分析和转换逻辑，独立于 CLI 和服务编排。
基础设施（infra）模块暴露稳定的底层外观，调用者应优先使用公共外观而非深入内部实现路径。
